# Duvox - AI Cold Calling Software

> Duvox is AI cold calling software that sounds human. Full-duplex voice AI for real estate teams. Your AI SDR calls leads, qualifies them, and books appointments automatically.

Duvox uses full-duplex voice AI technology for natural, human-like phone conversations. Unlike traditional AI calling solutions that have robotic pauses, Duvox enables real-time two-way conversation just like talking to a human sales rep.

## Main Pages

- / : Homepage - AI cold calling software overview
- /guide : Complete guide to AI cold calling
- /blog : Educational articles on AI SDR and voice AI
- /use-cases/real-estate : Real estate-specific AI cold calling solution

## Comparison Pages

- /vs/retell-ai : Duvox vs Retell AI comparison
- /vs/bland-ai : Duvox vs Bland AI comparison
- /vs/vapi : Duvox vs Vapi comparison

## Key Features

- Full-duplex voice AI (no robotic pauses)
- Lead qualification automation
- Appointment booking
- CRM integration
- Campaign management
- Real estate industry focus

## Blog Topics

- What is an AI SDR
- Full duplex voice AI explained
- How AI cold calling works
- AI cold calling for real estate
- ROI of AI outbound calling
